title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company backed by $85M+ in funding and trusted by brands like The New York Times and Wiz, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience exceeds 7+ requirement, proven scaling expertise, strong Salesforce/RevOps credentials, and fintech/AI-native GTM background directly matches Finout's domain. Tel Aviv hybrid location is ideal fit.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's impressive $85M+ raise and your Head of RevOps opening—the fintech/cloud cost management space is compelling, especially as companies scale revenue ops complexity. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS RevOps and deep Salesforce expertise across high-growth environments, I'd be interested in exploring how I could help Finout accelerate revenue visibility and cross-functional alignment from Tel Aviv.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Push Security, a cybersecurity SaaS company, is hiring a Head of RevOps to serve as the operational backbone of sales and marketing, reporting to the CRO. Requires 5+ years owning the RevOps function in a hands-on 'doer' capacity, deep experience with both Salesforce and HubSpot (including the in-progress HubSpot-to-Salesforce migration), process automation, AI tooling integration, and growth-stage SaaS experience. The role also oversees marketing operations and owns dashboards from rep to executive level.

The cybersecurity focus and growth-stage context align perfectly with his core strengths, and the HubSpot-to-Salesforce migration is exactly the kind of complex operational challenge he excels at.

With 15+ years building RevOps functions from the ground up, including deep hands-on experience architecting both Salesforce and HubSpot ecosystems and integrating AI tooling for pipeline predictability, I'm confident I can accelerate your migration timeline while fortifying your rep-to-executive dashboards and process automation. I'd love to explore how to turn this operational transition into a competitive advantage.

title: Head of RevOps

This pivotal role shapes how GTM teams execute, from compensation design to forecasting, reporting, systems, and strategic planning. The leader will be both a hands-on operator and strategic partner working with Sales, Marketing, Product, Finance, and Legal. Responsibilities include leading day-to-day sales ops (quota management, commissions, forecasting, annual planning) and building board/executive-level reporting and change management across GTM functions.

Remote role in US aligns with location preferences, and Candid Health's healthcare SaaS complexity offers meaningful growth challenge for a 15+ year veteran.

Your need for someone to own both the mechanics (quota, commissions, forecasting) and the strategy (board reporting, cross-functional change) is exactly where I've driven the most impact—would be worth a brief conversation about how we could structure this function to accelerate your next growth phase.
